name: Bank Of Queensland Limited.
analysis: It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.2800, stop A$5.8509, target A$6.9156 (1.48:1) — then trail it.
